content: What architecture pattern should we use for the KB upgrade?
I recommend the Repository pattern for all DB access. Each entity (knowledge_entries, conversation_turns, entity_index) gets its own repository class.
Decision: use Repository pattern. What about the quality gate?
The quality gate should run before storage in the ingest pipeline. It validates: minimum length (50 chars), duplicate detection (cosine >0.95), and calculates a quality score (0-100).
TODO: implement quality gate as first step in IngestPipeline
How should we implement token counting?
Use chars/4 approximation: Math.ceil(content.length / 4). Simple, no external dependency, accurate enough for 2000 token budget.
Context: KSA-110 requires token budget enforcement for pinned entries
mem_search results: found 3 entries about token counting
Decision: use chars/4 method. Next step: implement CoreMemoryManager.
